title: Dynamic Trees - Tensura
description: Adds Dynamic Trees compatibility for the Tensura: Reincarnated mod, introducing a dynamically growing version of its Sakura tree. Includes integration with the Tensura-BYG compatibility patch to correctly spawn dynamic Sakura in BYG biomes when installed
body:
🌳 Dynamic Trees - Tensura

 

This addon brings the beauty of Dynamic Trees to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod, starting with its iconic Sakura tree. Watch as the static Sakura trees are replaced with living, growing versions that evolve from sapling to mature tree, complete with falling petal particles thanks to custom leaf properties.

 
✨ Features

 

    Dynamic Sakura: Replaces the standard Sakura tree from Tensura: Reincarnated with a fully dynamic version.

    Realistic Growth: Trees grow progressively over time, developing unique shapes.

    Falling Petals: Enjoy the aesthetic of gently falling Sakura petals, adding life to your biomes.

    World Generation: Automatically replaces static Sakura trees during world generation.

    Bee Nests: Has a chance to generate bee nests naturally on the branches.

 
🧩 Smart Compatibility

 

This addon is designed to work seamlessly with or without the Tensura-BYG compatibility patch:

    Tensura + Dynamic Trees - Tensura (Only)

        Dynamic Sakura trees will fully replace the original static trees in the tensura:sakura_forest biome.

    Tensura + Tensura-BYG + BYG + Dynamic Trees - Tensura

        The original tensura:sakura_forest biome will not generate (as handled by Tensura-BYG).

        Instead, Dynamic Sakura trees will be added to the byg:cherry_blossom_forest biome from Oh The Biomes You'll Go
